title: Snapshot Command Behavior Fix

old_behavior_fixed.previous_behavior: The top command center snapshot action dispatched the snapshot save event immediately.
old_behavior_fixed.new_behavior: The top Snapshot Builder command only switches Overview into snapshot mode, expands the Snapshot Builder helper, and scrolls the Intelligence panel into view.

new_snapshot_mode_behavior.no_parcel_copy: Snapshot will capture the current map, active layers, countywide intelligence, and caveats. Select a parcel first if you want parcel-specific facts included.
new_snapshot_mode_behavior.selected_parcel_copy: Snapshot will include selected parcel facts, map view, active layers, Intelligence Brief, and caveats.

real_save_button_behavior.location: Snapshot Builder helper and explicit Snapshot Builder right-panel action

saved_count_verification.top_snapshot_builder_click: Did not show saved confirmation and did not change the rendered saved-count state.
saved_count_verification.explicit_save_click: Created saved snapshot state and updated the rendered saved-count chip.
saved_count_verification.selected_parcel_builder_state: With CFS-PARCEL-0149726579 selected, Snapshot Builder showed parcel-specific capture wording and did not save until the explicit save action.

documentation_updates: README now explains Snapshot Builder opens the capture workflow and Save Snapshot inside the helper creates the saved snapshot.
Demo walkthrough now uses Snapshot Builder as the command entry and Save Snapshot as the explicit save action.
Final demo checklist now verifies that Snapshot Builder does not create a snapshot before explicit save.
Two-minute demo script uses Snapshot Builder in the command-center action list.

smoke_test_results.dev_stack: npm run dev:cfs started CFS on http://localhost:3000 and FastAPI on http://127.0.0.1:8000 with health checks passing.
smoke_test_results.demo_parcel_search_and_select: CFS-PARCEL-0149726579 selected successfully; selected parcel intelligence appeared.
smoke_test_results.browser_console_errors: No blocking errors observed during this smoke path.

remaining_known_issues: The repository still contains unrelated dirty worktree changes from prior phases; this phase did not revert or delete them.

A first root-level attempt to run python -m compileall app could not list app because this repository stores the backend package at backend/app; the exact command passed when run from the backend directory.
